title: Form Automation
excerpt:
Hi. 
when submiting a form, an Item-ID is automatically created. 
i would like to send this Item-ID to the submitter of the form - i can find his details through a field in the form called: email address. 
Is it possible…

posts.author: sefi.doron.mohgov (Sefi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.
when submiting a form, an Item-ID is automatically created.
i would like to send this Item-ID to the submitter of the form - i can find his details through a field in the form called: email address.
Is it possible to automatically send him an email with the created Item-ID?

Many thanks!
Sefi

posts.author: Foobart (Bart Breeschoten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sefi,

Is the generated item-ID stored in one of the columns on your board? If so, then you should be able to include it in an e-mailmessage.

e-mailautomation726×606 56.6 KB

This example lists an Item Name for inclusion in the e-mailmessage and not an Item ID, but I do not have a column that contains Item ID’s.

I hope this helps in any way.

Kind regards,

Bart

posts.author: dharmikjagodana (DHARMIK JAGODANA)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe EasyMails could assist you with that. You can utilize our app to automatically send emails when a form is submitted, and leverage our mergeTags feature to attach the ItemId to the email.

Screenshot 2024-04-30 at 1.39.44 PM390×757 44.8 KB
